cause_analysis.narrative: Body Beautiful Day and Med Spa churned on 2026-03-13 after 211 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-06 via app_chat — 66 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 66 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 4 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-18 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Keyword impression report\n\nBody: Hi Destiny and Marlena, As discussed in our last meeting, please find the at…" — no outbound response in 56 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-18 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Keyword impression report\n\nBody: Hi Destiny and Marlena, As discussed in our last meeting, please find the at…" — no outbound response in 56 days.

Hi Destini,   We are glad that your Account Manager was able to connect with you and get everything sorted. We will go ahead and close this ticket for now, but if you ever need anything in the future, we are always here for you!

I am really sorry to hear that you wish to discontinue. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback helps us improve and ensures we close things in a way that supports your business long-term.
